note_maddah: U+0653 appears on 22 different letter types. Most frequent: bare alif (U+0627, 2945), alif maqsura (U+0649, 839), waw (U+0648, 583). Not an alif-specific mark — recorded as observed.
note_combining_hamza: U+0654 (combining hamza above) as a diacritic mark on 496 letter instances. Distinct from the five standard hamza seat letters.
